creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Thibault Jouan from comment #67)
Testing with the recently added patch (2022-01-27 11:30 UTC), only 9 failures against the ports tree as of 2bde8a83e68d522b09ad38199bab5419dc19f200 (Wed Jan 26 15:59:20 2022 +0100).


* devel/rubygem-xdg
* devel/rubygem-xdg5
* graphics/rubygem-objectdetect
* mail/rubygem-tmail	
* science/cdcl
* www/rubygem-gitlab-gollum-lib
* www/rubygem-gollum-lib
* www/rubygem-gollum-rugged_adapter	


Next I will run against 2564716ea1ef7424132779e3b74261c101955c6d
